description.en: Large, iconic domesticated herbivores known for their highly specialized four-chambered stomachs which gracefully process tough grasses.
description.zh: 体型庞大且标志性的家养食草动物，以其高度特化的「四室胃」而闻名，这种胃结构让它们能够从容地消化极其坚硬的草料。

anatomy.en: Cows lack upper front teeth; instead, they have a tough dental pad. Perhaps their most hardcore feature is their stomach, with the largest compartment, the rumen, capable of holding up to 50 gallons of partially digested food!
anatomy.zh: 牛其实没有上门牙；取而代之的是一块坚硬的厚齿龈。但它们身上最硬核的特征可能还要数它们的胃，其中最大的隔间「瘤胃」甚至能容纳多达50加仑（约190升）半消化的食物！

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are highly social herd animals that form strong lifelong friendships. Cows spend up to 8 hours a day simply chewing their cud—regurgitating food to chew it a second time—which is essential for their unique digestion.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是高度社会化的群居动物，甚至会和其他牛建立长久的友谊。牛每天会花长达8小时的时间来反刍——也就是把吃下去的食物吐出来再嚼一次——这对于它们独特的消化系统至关重要。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Descended from the extinct wild aurochs, domestic cows now number over a billion worldwide and inhabit vast pastures, open fields, and farms in nearly every country on Earth.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 作为已经灭绝的野生原牛的后代，家牛现在的全球数量已经超过十亿头。它们栖息在地球上几乎每个国家广阔的牧场、开阔的田野和热闹的农场中。
